name: Argonaut Software
description: British game developer known for 3D technology work with Nintendo on Star Fox and the Super FX chip.

eras.title: 3D Technology Era
eras.description: Argonaut builds its reputation through 3D engines, Nintendo collaboration, Star Fox, and Super FX technology.

eras.title: Croc and Late Era
eras.description: Later period focused on original console games and licensed projects before the company closed.
